Video DEFINING SUCCESS

Defining Your Success Metric (13 min)

Part of the "Meta Ads | Foundational Knowledge" module.

Defining Your Success Metric (13 min)

DEFINING SUCCESS

The number one mistake advertisers make is that they start spending money before they understand their success metrics. We’re not going to let that be you.

You can find your playbook “PDF Resources” on the right-hand side under

Downloads.

Profit Analysis Doc

Note: Please reference these downloads while going through this training.
